frame_analyses.description: Task completed, foam appendage secured with suture loop at target location

confidence_rationale: Clear view of task completion and timing. However, camera angle makes precise measurement of suture deviation from marks difficult to assess with high confidence. No obvious penalties observed.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from target marks due to camera angle and distance
Precise knot pusher usage details due to frame limitations
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with efficient completion time of 85 seconds. Clean extracorporeal suture technique with proper instrument handling throughout.
strengths: Excellent completion time well within expert range (60-100s)
improvement_suggestions: Continue practicing to maintain consistency at this expert level
Focus on precise mark targeting for optimal accuracy
